---
name: Epic
about: Track a major platform workstream from implementation-notes
title: "[EPIC-XX] "
labels: ["type:epic"]
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the major outcome this epic should deliver.

## Background

Reference the relevant planning notes:

- `implementation-notes/00-project-vision.md`
- `implementation-notes/02-target-architecture.md`
- `implementation-notes/05-github-project-breakdown.md`

## Scope

- [ ] Define the implementation boundary.
- [ ] Break the epic into task issues.
- [ ] Confirm required contracts/schemas.
- [ ] Confirm testing expectations.
- [ ] Confirm documentation expectations.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All child task issues are complete.
- [ ] Relevant tests pass.
- [ ] Required documentation is updated.
- [ ] `implementation-notes/12-project-status.md` is updated.
- [ ] Any architecture decision is captured in an ADR.

## Child Issues

- #

## Notes For Codex

Before implementing tasks under this epic, read the related files in `implementation-notes` and keep work small enough for reviewable pull requests.
